name: Get listed on Kayak
description: Kayak searches hundreds of travel sites to suggest the right business to consumers
main_title: Add or Claim Your Hotel Listing on Kayak
richtext:
Step 1: Open Hotel Listing Console

Vist Kayak Hotel Owners. Click on Edit hotel.You should be redirected to a login page if you haven’t logged in already.

Step 2: Search For Your Hotel

Once you’re signed in, you will be presented with the following screen. Click on Find Hotel Listing.

There are two fields. Hotel City and Hotel Name. Enter the correct information for these fields and click on search.

You will then be presented with the search results. Click on Edit present in the Actions column of the search results.

If there was no listing found, you can then safely assume that Kayak doesn’t have your hotel listed as of yet. You can then Create a fresh listing for your hotel by clicking Create New Listing.

Step 3: Check Your Information

You have the opportunity to now modify and cross-check your hotel’s business information on Kayak.

After cross-checking your hotel information in Contact Information, Details, Photos and Amenities, you should be presented with a summary of your information in the last Confirm step.

Once you are satisified with the information summary, click on Finish to submit the hotel listing to Kayak. Kayak takes your information, verifies it and then publishes your verified hotel listing on Kayak. You will be informed about this by Kayak.
join_title: Spend More Time Running Your Business
join_description: And, less time obsessing about your local presence

seo.title: Add or Claim Your Hotel Listing on Kayak | Synup
seo.description: Learn how to claim and create your Kayak business listing with this quick and simple tutorial.
